title: React Test Generator
author: JSONbored
detailMarkdown:
# React Test Generator

Automatically creates or updates test files when React components are modified.

## Trust
- Source: source not provided
- Package: no package download
- Review: unclaimed

## Install
```bash
mkdir -p .claude/hooks && touch .claude/hooks/react-component-test-generator.sh && chmod +x .claude/hooks/react-component-test-generator.sh
```

## Config
```json
{
  "hooks": {
    "postToolUse": {
      "script": "./.claude/hooks/react-component-test-generator.sh",
      "matchers": [
        "write",
        "edit"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

## Usage
mkdir -p .claude/hooks && touch .claude/hooks/react-component-test-generator.sh && chmod +x .claude/hooks/react-component-test-generator.sh
seoDescription: Automatically creates or updates test files when React components are modified. This PostToolUse hook provides comprehensive React component test generation ...
